article_title: Burnaby Council — 8.2. Attachment 1 - REZ 25-11 - Part 3 of 3 - Front Elevation, West and East Elevations 2026-04-14.pdf

briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to Consider Rezoning Application REZ 25-11 Building Elevations
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to review architectural elevation drawings (front, west, and east views) submitted as part of rezoning application REZ 25-11. These drawings are part of a proposal to change how a property is zoned — meaning what can be built or used there.
briefs.action_required: Check Burnaby's council meeting agenda for REZ 25-11 if this development is near your business.
